SYS_UNKNOWN: System error, please try again later
SYS_INTERNAL: Internal server error, please try again later
SYS_UNAVAILABLE: Service temporarily unavailable, please try again later
SYS_TIMEOUT: Request timed out, please try again later
SYS_DB_ERROR: Data processing failed, please try again later
AUTH_ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Account is locked, please try again later
TOKEN_ACCESS_EXPIRED: Access token expired, please login again
TOKEN_REFRESH_EXPIRED: Refresh token expired, please login again
SESSION_REVOKED: Session has been revoked, please login again
SESSION_DEVICE_LIMIT: Maximum number of logged-in devices exceeded
PWD_EXPIRED: Password has expired, please change it first
PWD_SAME_AS_OLD: New password must differ from the old one
PWD_VERSION_MISMATCH: Password has changed, please login again
PERM_ROLE_IN_USE: Role is in use and cannot be deleted
USER_EXTERNAL_IDENTITY_LINKED: This external account is already linked to another user
USER_LOCKED: Account temporarily locked due to repeated failed logins, please try again later
CANNOT_UNLINK_LAST_LOGIN_METHOD: Cannot unlink: this is your only login method
EXTERNAL_LINK_MUST_USE_OAUTH: External account linking must go through the OAuth callback
REFRESH_REUSE_DETECTED: Token reuse detected, please login again
PASSWORD_VERSION_MISMATCH: Password has changed, please login again
RBAC_ROLE_IS_SYSTEM: Built-in system role cannot be modified or deleted
SYS_CFG_TYPE_MISMATCH: Config value does not match the declared type
SYS_DICT_ITEM_VALUE_TAKEN: Dictionary item value is already taken within this dictionary
TASK_INVALID_STATE: Task state does not allow this operation
TASK_MAX_ATTEMPTS: Task has reached the maximum number of attempts
TASK_ENQUEUE_FAILED: Failed to enqueue task, please try again later
SSO_STATE_MISMATCH: SSO state validation failed, please restart login
SSO_CODE_EXCHANGE_FAILED: Failed to exchange SSO authorization code for token
SSO_USERINFO_FAILED: Failed to fetch SSO user info
SSO_ACCOUNT_NOT_LINKED: This SSO account is not linked
SSO_AUTO_REGISTER_DISABLED: SSO auto-registration is disabled, please contact an administrator
SSO_EMAIL_DOMAIN_NOT_ALLOWED: This email domain is not allowed for auto-registration
